candidate_resume_text:
# 候选人主简历样例

- 围绕 LLM 辅助工作流构建过内部工具
- 完成过简历评估与评分流程原型
- 与产品和工程团队进行过高频协作

jd_inputs.content:
=== JD ===
Title: LLM Product Engineer
Company: Example AI
SourceType: text
Body:
- Build evaluation pipelines for resume and strategy ranking
- Strong Python and prompt engineering fundamentals
- Partner with product and engineering on AI workflows

=== JD ===
Title: Applied AI Engineer

SourceType: text
Body:
- Build internal automation tools for AI-assisted operations
- Python, LLM workflow tooling, and product collaboration
- Bonus for metrics ownership and experimentation rigor
